title: stechmannia straussii
intro: Stechmannia straussii, also known as Chinese angelica or dong quai, is a plant species in the Apiaceae family, commonly referred to as a type of dong quai or female ginseng. Traditionally used in Asian medicine, Stechmannia straussii has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and anti-oxidant properties, making it a valuable medicinal herb. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including relief from menstrual cramps, improvement of digestion, and enhancement of immune function. Stechmannia straussii is often used in herbal preparations, such as capsules, teas, and infusions, which are available over-the-counter in many health food stores and online.
